name: Thalys
description: The Thalys played a ceremonial role in the Zariman harvest festival, and was intended to reap the first fruits of Tau. Now twisted from this purpose, it plants Void shards in enemy flesh instead. Each new shard planted causes existing shards to inflict damage on their hosts.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Thalys played a ceremonial role in the Zariman harvest festival, and was intended to reap the first fruits of Tau. Now twisted from this purpose, it plants Void shards in enemy flesh instead. Each new shard planted causes existing shards to inflict damage on their hosts.

components.name: Entrati Obols
components.description:
During the Orokin era, these obols were a commonly recognized mark of the Entrati family. Some Archimedeans even used them as good luck talismans.

Location: Albrecht's Laboratories (Deimos)

components.name: Rune Marrow
components.description:
Rune Marrow erupts from Duviri’s core.

Location: The Undercroft in Duviri

components.name: Silphsela
components.description:
It is traditionally held that to see Silphsela floating in the air heralds an imminent change in the sky.

Location: Duviri

components.name: Temporal Dust
components.description:
The dust of decayed universes, rich in entropy. Entrati's research postulates it as the animating agent of the nightmarish Murmur.

Obtained from Murmur in Isleweaver missions (Duviri)
